name: JLT Mobile Computers AB (publ)
summary: JLT Mobile Computers AB (publ), together with its subsidiaries, develops and manufactures rugged mobile vehicle-mounted computers in Nordic region, rest of European Union, the United States, and internationally. The company's products are used in the transportation, warehousing/logistics, ports, forestry, mining, automation, and military and emergency response vehicles. It also offers manufacturing; transportation; warehousing and distribution; ports and maritime operations; mining; energy; and agriculture solutions. In addition, the company provides software development services. It sells its products through a network of resellers, system integrators, and end customers.
